End of this month please. I'm expecting some money to come in by then. Please give me till then 🙏
Noted Sunita, thank you so much for working with us on this 😊 I'll have the payment link sent to this number shortly. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything 🙏

messages.text: Namaste Savitri ji, Priya here from Riverline Financial Services. Hope you're doing okay. Just wanted to quickly discuss your account with us.
Hello... I want to pay, believe me. But I'm in a really bad place right now. I lost my job, no income at all.
Before we go further, can you just confirm the last 4 digits of your registered phone number, please?
Yes yes, this is my account. I really want to clear this up, but I need help. Job toh chali gayi meri, koi income nahi hai.
Okay, as per our records, there's a pending amount of ₹23,000 on your account. How would you like to resolve this?
I want to pay, but I just CANNOT afford the full amount right now. Is there any way the amount can be reduced, please? I'm begging you.
I've spoken with my team, and we can offer you a settlement of ₹20,000. This offer is valid for the next 7 days.
Even that is a lot for me right now, beta. But I'll try somehow...
Okay Savitri ji. If we agree on that amount, roughly when do you think you can clear the payment?
Could I get 2 weeks? I will have to borrow from relatives... please give me time.
Thank you for confirming, Savitri ji. You'll receive a payment link on this number shortly.

Main pay karna chahta hun par poora amount afford nahi kar sakta. Kuch kam ho sakta hai?

messages.text: Hi Santosh ji 😊 Main Priya bol rahi hun Riverline Financial Services se. Aapke ek account ke baare mein baat karni thi, thoda time hai aapke paas?

Koi baat nahi Santosh ji 😊 Pehle ek chhoti si verification kar lete hain — aapka jo registered phone number ya email hai humare paas, kya aap confirm kar sakte hain?

Bilkul samjhati hun! Full payment mein poora ₹70,000 ek baar dena hoga. Settlement mein thoda kam amount mein bhi close ho sakta hai account. Main apni team se ek baar check karti hun aapke liye — kaunsa option aapko suit karta hai?
Agar settlement le liya toh mera credit score pe kya asar padega? Yeh cheez mujhe samajh nahi aa rahi 😕
Santosh ji good news hai! Team ne ₹61,500 ka settlement approve kar diya hai aapke liye. Kya aap is pe proceed karna chahenge? 😊
Wait wait — yeh ₹61,500 settlement wala amount hai ya full payment wala? Main thoda confuse ho gaya hun honestly
Santosh ji yeh ₹61,500 settlement amount hai, matlab full ₹80,500 ki jagah sirf itna deke account close ho jayega. Koi rough idea hai kab tak arrange ho sakta hai?
Actually pehle family se baat karni padegi iske baare mein. Kya main thoda time lekar aapko get back kar sakta hun?
Haan bilkul Santosh ji, family se discuss kar lijiye. Koi ek date bata sakte hain jab tak aap revert kar payenge? 😊
Haan dekhta hun family se baat karke... thoda time chahiye bas. Get back kar sakta hun?
Koi tension nahi Santosh ji, le lijiye thoda time. Roughly kab tak baat ho jayegi unse? Ek date de dijiye toh main accordingly follow up karungi
Arre same baat hai, pehle ghar pe baat karni hai. Thoda aur time de sakte hain kya?
Theek hai Santosh ji samajh sakti hun. Ek kaam karte hain — aap family se baat kar lijiye aur mujhe bata dijiye payment kab tak ho sakti hai approximately?
Sach bolun toh abhi exactly nahi pata kab kar paunga. Let me think over it properly

Santosh ji main samajh sakti hun situation. Par yeh account bahut time se pending hai toh jitna jaldi ho sake utna better rahega aapke liye. Koi bhi rough date denge toh main uske hisaab se help kar sakti hun 🙏
Haan yaar abhi kuch pakka nahi bol sakta. Sochna padega thoda
Okay Santosh ji. Kya kal ya parso tak ek update de sakte hain? Taaki main aapke liye settlement ka option hold kar sakun 🙏
Family se pehle baat karni hai yaar. Thoda aur time chahiye, phir batata hun

Santosh ji bilkul, family se zaroor discuss karein. Bas ek kaam karein — jab bhi baat ho, mujhe ek message kar dijiye. Settlement offer kuch hi din aur valid hai, toh jaldi batayenge toh better rahega 😊
Abhi nahi pata exactly kab pay kar paunga. Let me think on this
Theek hai Santosh ji. Main 2 din baad ek baar follow up karungi. Aap tab tak soch lijiye aur family se bhi pooch lijiye. Settlement ka option genuinely acha hai aapke liye 🙏
